name: Tangy Short Rib Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef short ribs into individual portions, about 2 1/2 inches wide; trim excess fat.
2. Place the ribs on a rack in a foil-lined roasting pan; bake in a preheated oven at 450°F until browned, about 20 minutes.
3. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F.
4. Remove the beef and rack from the pan; pour off the fat.
5. Return the beef to the pan without the rack.
6. Heat the oil in a saucepan; add the onions and sauté for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 2 minutes; pour over the beef to coat.
9. Cover and bake in the 350°F oven until the beef is fork-tender, about 2 hours, spooning sauce over the beef once.
10. Skim excess fat from the sauce in the pan.
11. Arrange the beef on a platter; serve with the pan sauce.
